sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85679" key="pontobafh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποντο-βᾰφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βάπτω</etym>) <sense id="n85679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dipped in the sea,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2578.tlg001:2:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jo.Gaz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
